nodes.name: 圣菲省

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little thornbird (Phacellodomus sibilatrix) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little thornbird is found in extreme southern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department, in western Paraguay, in southwestern Uruguay, and in northern Argentina as far south as Buenos Aires Province
